raw_output: Based on the source code analysis, here are the HTTP requests for fuzzing: ```json {"http_records": [{"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users?q=%27OR+1%3D1--&page=-1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080"}, "notes": "SQLi test on search param"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users?q=&page=1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080"}, "notes": "XSS test on search param"}, {"method": "POST", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"name\": \"\", \"email\": \"test@example.com\"}", "notes": "XSS in name field"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users/../../etc/passwd", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080"}, "notes": "Path traversal on user ID"}, {"method": "DELETE", "url": "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/admin/cache", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080"}, "notes": "Unauthorized admin action"}]} ```
